title: Aggressive Passenger — Gate Confrontation
description: A passenger is verbally aggressive at a boarding gate, refusing instructions from airline staff and threatening other passengers.

event.details: Airline staff requesting security assistance — passenger refusing to board and becoming aggressive
Passenger gesturing aggressively — other passengers moving away from the area
Motion sensor detects rapid passenger movement away from Gate B4 area

optimal_response.primary_action: dispatch patrol to T2_GATE_B4 and attempt verbal de-escalation
optimal_response.secondary_action: separate the individual from other passengers and request APD if physical threats made
optimal_response.do_not: Do not match the passenger's aggressive tone or attempt physical restraint without justification
optimal_response.escalation: If physical assault occurs, escalate to Level 4 and call APD immediately
